digest.title: GeForce NOW Sets Sail With ‘Path of Exile: Curse of the Allflame’ Joining the Cloud
digest.tldr: Lock in and load up the cloud.  GFN Thursday brings fresh updates and new adventures, all ready to play without waiting for downloads.

digest.title: OpenAI’s accidental attack against Hugging Face is science fiction that happened
Claude’s voice mode is now available for Opus and Sonnet
digest.tldr: Until now, voice mode has only been available on Claude Haiku, Anthropic's faster but less powerful model.  Now the company is making its Opus and Sonnet models available in voice mode, and extending its reach into apps…

digest.title: OpenAI is making big claims as it rolls out ChatGPT Health to everyone
digest.tldr: OpenAI is rolling out ChatGPT Health to everyone in the US on Thursday, allowing more people to connect their medical records and health-tracking information to the chatbot.
